channel.title: KillBait RSS Feed
channel.description: KillBait - News highlights delivered clearly and responsibly—no clickbait, no sensationalism

item.title: Environmental justice group sues California over carbon market overhaul
item.description: An environmental justice group is suing California's top air regulator over its overhaul of the state's cap-and-invest carbon market program, alleging it bypassed required environmental reviews for a ...

item.title: Arthur Zwane's potential role in Bafana Bafana's future structures
item.description: The article discusses the potential appointment of Arthur Zwane as a coach within the Bafana Bafana setup, highlighting his qualifications and experience. Zwane, currently head coach of Amazulu, is li...

item.title: Kenya's Historic Sites and Monuments: A Guide to Cultural Heritage
item.description: Kenya's historic built environments, including museums, monuments, and ancient ruins, offer a glimpse into the country's rich history and cultural heritage. The article highlights 20 notable sites acr...

item.title: Equity Bank Launches Loan Program for Vehicle Gas Conversion
item.description: Kenyan financial institution Equity Bank has introduced a new loan product aimed at helping vehicle owners transition their cars from traditional fuel systems to gas-powered alternatives. This initiat...

item.title: Summer McIntosh withdraws from Canadian swimming trials due to illness
item.description: Summer McIntosh, the star swimmer from Toronto, has withdrawn from the remaining events of the Canadian swimming trials after consulting with her coach and medical staff. The 19-year-old athlete, who ...

item.title: Philippine Military Tracks 74 Chinese Vessels in West Philippine Sea in June
item.description: The Philippine military monitored 74 Chinese navy and coast guard vessels in key areas of the disputed West Philippine Sea (WPS) during June, according to the Armed Forces of the Philippines (AFP). Re...

item.title: UN survey highlights economic challenges hindering youths' ability to start families in Nigeria
item.description: A new UN survey reveals that economic hardship, unstable jobs, and housing issues are preventing young people worldwide from starting families, contrary to assumptions that they are disinterested in m...

item.title: A Single Mother's Journey Through Chaos and Crime in 'Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed'
item.description: The article reviews the AppleTV series *Maximum Pleasure Guaranteed*, following divorced single mother Paula (Tatiana Maslany) as she navigates a complex web of murder, corporate malfeasance, and cust...

item.title: Edo State Mandates CCTV Installation for Businesses to Boost Security
item.description: The Edo State government has issued an ultimatum to businesses, demanding the installation of closed-circuit television (CCTV) cameras within a specified timeframe. This move aims to enhance public sa...

item.title: Former Senate Official Appeals Dismissal Over Shooting Incident
item.description: Former Senate acting sergeant-at-arms Mao Aplasca announced his intention to challenge the Ombudsman's decision to dismiss him for grave misconduct and gross neglect of duty related to the May 13 shoo...

item.title: Bank of Tanzania builds foreign exchange reserves with 28 tonnes of gold purchased over 18 months
item.description: The Bank of Tanzania (BoT) has accumulated about 28 tonnes of gold valued at approximately US$3.68 billion (around Sh9.76 trillion) over the past 18 months as part of the Government's wider strategy t...

item.title: OECD report highlights sharp decline in Australian living standards
item.description: A new OECD report reveals Australians have experienced one of the most significant declines in living standards among developed nations since the pandemic. The report warns real wages are set to fall ...

item.title: Eddie Vedder reacts to Pearl Jam's 'Alive' playing at USA vs Belgium World Cup match

item.title: Relationship advice: How to craft romantic texts that make her think of you

item.title: Trump Administration Pressures States to Alter Election Rules for Counterterrorism Funding
item.description: The Trump administration is pressuring states to overhaul election rules in exchange for federal counterterrorism funding, according to a New York Times report. The demands include transitioning to ha...

item.title: England faces Norway in World Cup quarter-final clash with key players
item.description: England defender Marc Guéhi is eager to face his Manchester City teammate Erling Haaland in the World Cup quarter-final against Norway. The Three Lions secured a dramatic 3-2 comeback win over Mexico,...

item.title: Tips for sleeping through a heatwave and maintaining a cool bedroom
item.description: The article explores strategies to improve sleep quality during heatwaves, emphasizing the impact of high temperatures on sleep patterns. It highlights the importance of maintaining an optimal bedroom...

item.title: J&K High Court declines Congress worker's request to transfer cheque bounce case from Srinagar to Jammu
item.description: The Jammu & Kashmir and Ladakh High Court has dismissed a petition filed by Congress worker Sonaullah Dar seeking the transfer of his cheque bounce case from Srinagar to Jammu. The case, filed under S...

item.title: Egypt Coach's Controversial X Gesture and FIFA Response in World Cup 2026 Match Against Argentina
item.description: Egypt manager Hossam Hassan made a controversial X gesture after his team's 2-0 lead was overturned by Argentina in the World Cup 2026 Round of 16. The gesture, recognized by FIFA as a signal for raci...
